sigWerErrors.reason: Minor misspelling of a proper noun, but still clearly refers to the same name in context.
The possessive 'kartımın' (of my card) is changed to the locative 'kartımda' (on my card), which slightly alters the meaning but does not derail the overall intent of the sentence.
